name: normiculus-reminder-dispatcher
description: Background reminder dispatcher for WhatsApp using wacli and Firebase Realtime Database (read-only).

scripts.start:bg: sh -c 'mkdir -p .runtime && nohup node src/index.js > .runtime/service.log 2>&1 & echo $! > .runtime/service.pid && echo "Started with PID $(cat .runtime/service.pid)"'
scripts.stop:bg: sh -c 'if [ -f .runtime/service.pid ]; then kill $(cat .runtime/service.pid) && rm -f .runtime/service.pid && echo "Stopped"; else echo "No PID file found"; fi'
